tasks.subject: Task 0: Test environment for the worktree
tasks.description:
Infra: engram-tester-so container (python:3.12-slim, engram-net, worktree apps/backend at /app, ENGRAM_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://engram:engram@engram-testpg:5432/engram_so) + engram_so DB + poetry install + green baseline of real_provider_tests/distillation_tests/curation_tests. No commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "docker exec engram-tester-so pytest engram/model_policy/real_provider_tests.py engram/memory/distillation_tests.py engram/memory/curation_tests.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["tester container on engram-net with worktree mounted", "baseline modules green"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Session distillation {"memories"} contract + rubric + tolerant parser + fake gateway
tasks.description:
See plan Task 1: session_distillation_system_prompt -> single JSON object {"memories": [...]} with confidence rubric + good/bad example; parse_synthesized_candidates accepts object/bare-array, valid-empty -> (); generated_candidates_payload -> {"memories": [...]}.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/backend/engram/memory/distillation.py", "apps/backend/engram/model_policy/services.py", "apps/backend/engram/memory/distillation_tests.py"], "verifyCommand": "docker exec engram-tester-so pytest engram/memory/distillation_tests.py engram/model_policy/services_tests.py engram/memory/tasks_tests.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["memories-object parses", "empty memories -> ()", "bare array still parses", "garbage -> fallback", "fake gateway emits memories object"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: OpenAI-compatible gateway response_format json_object
tasks.description:
See plan Task 2: structured_response_format(response_kind) helper; OpenAICompatibleGateway.call merges it into extra for candidates/curation_judgment; single unchanged; deepseek override preserved.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/backend/engram/model_policy/services.py", "apps/backend/engram/model_policy/real_provider_tests.py"], "verifyCommand": "docker exec engram-tester-so pytest engram/model_policy/real_provider_tests.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["candidates/judgment requests carry response_format json_object", "single requests do not", "deepseek thinking override preserved"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Anthropic gateway forced tool_use + per-kind max_tokens
tasks.description:
See plan Task 3: _ANTHROPIC_STRUCTURED_TOOLS (emit_memories/emit_judgment), forced tool_choice, _anthropic_content_text serializes tool_use input to JSON string, resolve_max_tokens (8192 candidates / 1024 default / policy.metadata override).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/backend/engram/model_policy/services.py", "apps/backend/engram/model_policy/real_provider_tests.py"], "verifyCommand": "docker exec engram-tester-so pytest engram/model_policy/real_provider_tests.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["forced tool_use for structured kinds", "tool_use input serialized back to JSON string", "max_tokens 8192 candidates / 1024 default / metadata override", "text fallback preserved"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Per-observation distillation — richer prompt fields + SKIP protocol
tasks.description:
See plan Task 4: provider_prompt adds Facts/Narrative/Concepts; distillation_system_prompt adds SKIP rule; MemoryCandidateWorkerResult.candidate optional + skipped flag; ProcessObservationRecorded early-return + MemoryCandidateSkipped audit; tasks.py returns 'skipped'.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/backend/engram/memory/services.py", "apps/backend/engram/memory/tasks.py", "apps/backend/engram/memory/services_tests.py"], "verifyCommand": "docker exec engram-tester-so pytest engram/memory/services_tests.py engram/memory/tasks_tests.py engram/memory/memory_worker_tests.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["provider_prompt carries facts/narrative/concepts", "SKIP creates no candidate + audit event", "non-SKIP flow unchanged", "celery task returns skipped"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Curation judge reason field + decision logging
tasks.description:
See plan Task 5: judge prompt requires decision+reason; parse_curation_reason defensive helper; _judge_decision logs curation_judge_decision with decision+reason; parse_curation_decision unchanged.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/backend/engram/memory/curation.py", "apps/backend/engram/memory/curation_tests.py"], "verifyCommand": "docker exec engram-tester-so pytest engram/memory/curation_tests.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["prompt requires decision+reason", "parse_curation_reason defensive", "decision+reason logged", "decision parsing unchanged"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Full verification + draft PR
tasks.description:
Full backend pytest + ruff check + ruff format --check in engram-tester-so; push feat/provider-structured-output; draft PR with evidence and merge-risk note (parallel chunking WIP in distillation.py).

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "docker exec engram-tester-so bash -c 'pytest -q && ruff check . && ruff format --check .'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["full suite green", "lint green", "draft PR opened with evidence"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
